title: obeliscaria
intro: Obeliscaria is a genus of flowering plants in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Obeliscaria has been used in traditional medicine to provide relief from various health problems, including hypertension, diabetes, and skin conditions, due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
